            ["hiv", "HIV"],
            ["osa", "NgÆ°ng thá»Ÿ khi ngá»§"],
            ["prematureMenopause", "MÃ£n kinh sá»›m"],
            ["preeclampsia", "Tiá»n sáº£n giáº­t / THA thai ká»³"],
            ["hsCRP", "hs-CRP tÄƒng dai dáº³ng"],
            ["lp_a", "Lipoprotein(a) tÄƒng"],
            ["subclinicalPlaqueOrHighCAC", "XÆ¡ vá»¯a dÆ°á»›i lÃ¢m sÃ ng / CAC tÄƒng"],
          ] as const).map(([k, lab]) => (
            <label key={k} style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, alignItems: "center", fontWeight: 900 }}>
              <input type="checkbox" checked={(mod as any)[k]} onChange={(e) => setMod((p) => ({ ...p, [k]: e.target.checked }))} />
              {lab}
            </label>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="divider" />

        {/* SCORE area */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
          <div style={{ fontWeight: 1100 }}>
            Thang Ä‘iá»ƒm SCORE (khi chÆ°a cÃ³ bá»‡nh ná»n phÃ¢n táº§ng nguy cÆ¡ ngay)
            <div style={{ color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 900, marginTop: 4 }}>
              {eligibleForScore
                ? "Báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ tÃ­nh SCORE trong POP-UP vÃ  Ã¡p dá»¥ng ngay cho phÃ¢n táº§ng."
                : "Hiá»‡n khÃ´ng eligible dÃ¹ng SCORE (ASCVD/ÄTÄ/CKD<60/FH/Ä‘ang dÃ¹ng thuá»‘c háº¡ lipidâ€¦)."}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            <button className="btn" onClick={() => openScore(suggestedDefaultModel())}>
              TÃ­nh SCORE (POP-UP)
            </button>
            <button className="btn" onClick={() => openScore("score2-asian")}>
              SCORE2-ASIA (POP-UP)
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {scoreApplied && (
          <div style={{ marginTop: 10, borderRadius: 14, border: "1px solid var(--line)", padding: 12, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.02)" }}>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 1100 }}>ÄÃ£ Ã¡p dá»¥ng káº¿t quáº£ SCORE</div>
            <div style={{ color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 900, marginTop: 4 }}>{scoreApplied.summary}</div>
            <div style={{ marginTop: 8, display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
              <button className="btn" onClick={() => setScoreApplied(null)} style={{ background: "white" }}>
                Bá» káº¿t quáº£ SCORE
              </button>
              <button className="btn" onClick={() => openScore(scoreApplied.model)}>
                TÃ­nh láº¡i (POP-UP)
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        <div style={{ marginTop: 14, color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 900 }}>
          LÆ°u Ã½: CÃ´ng cá»¥ há»— trá»£ tham kháº£o, khÃ´ng thay tháº¿ quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh lÃ¢m sÃ ng.
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* POPUP */}
      <ScorePopup
        open={scoreOpen}
        defaultModel={scoreDefaultModel}
        title="SCORE (tá»± tÃ­nh trong POP-UP, Ä‘Ã£ Ä‘iá»n sáºµn)"
        prefill={{
          region,
          sex,
          age,
          smoker: smoker ? 1 : 0,
          sbp,
          tc,
          hdl,
        }}
        onClose={() => setScoreOpen(false)}
        onApply={(r: ScorePopupResult) => {
          setScoreApplied(r);
          setScoreOpen(false);

          // âœ… sync ngÆ°á»£c vá» form chÃ­nh (Ä‘Ãºng yÃªu cáº§u cá»§a báº¡n)
          setRegion(r.inputs.region);
          setSex(r.inputs.sex);
          setAge(r.inputs.age);
          setSmoker(r.inputs.smoker === 1);
          setSbp(r.inputs.sbp);
          setTc(r.inputs.tc);
          setHdl(r.inputs.hdl);
        }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: C:\Users\meoti\OneDrive\Documents\Python\web\medical-tools\src\calculators\EGFR.tsx =====

// src/calculators/EGFR.tsx
import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import { useCases } from "../context/CasesContext";

type Sex = "female" | "male";

type Formula =
  | "ckd-epi-2021"
  | "ckd-epi-2009"
  | "mdrd-175"
  | "cockcroft-gault"
  | "schwartz-2009";

function clampNumber(v: number, min: number, max: number) {
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, v));
}

function round1(x: number) {
  return Math.round(x * 10) / 10;
}

function safePositive(x: number, fallback = 0.01) {
  if (!Number.isFinite(x)) return fallback;
  return Math.max(x, fallback);
}

/** CKD-EPI 2021 (Creatinine), race-free */
function egfrCkdEpi2021Creatinine(scrMgDl: number, age: number, sex: Sex) {
  const kappa = sex === "female" ? 0.7 : 0.9;
  const alpha = sex === "female" ? -0.241 : -0.302;
  const femaleFactor = sex === "female" ? 1.012 : 1;

  const ratio = scrMgDl / kappa;
  const minPart = Math.min(ratio, 1);
  const maxPart = Math.max(ratio, 1);

  return (
    142 *
    Math.pow(minPart, alpha) *
    Math.pow(maxPart, -1.2) *
    Math.pow(0.9938, age) *
    femaleFactor
  );
}

/** CKD-EPI 2009 (Creatinine) - bá» há»‡ sá»‘ chá»§ng tá»™c */
function egfrCkdEpi2009Creatinine(scrMgDl: number, age: number, sex: Sex) {
  const kappa = sex === "female" ? 0.7 : 0.9;
  const alpha = sex === "female" ? -0.329 : -0.411;
  const femaleFactor = sex === "female" ? 1.018 : 1;

  const ratio = scrMgDl / kappa;
  const minPart = Math.min(ratio, 1);
  const maxPart = Math.max(ratio, 1);

  return (
    141 *
    Math.pow(minPart, alpha) *
    Math.pow(maxPart, -1.209) *
    Math.pow(0.993, age) *
    femaleFactor
  );
}

/** MDRD 175 */
function egfrMdrd175(scrMgDl: number, age: number, sex: Sex) {
  const femaleFactor = sex === "female" ? 0.742 : 1;
  return 175 * Math.pow(scrMgDl, -1.154) * Math.pow(age, -0.203) * femaleFactor;
}

/** Cockcroft-Gault (CrCl, mL/min) */
function crclCockcroftGault(scrMgDl: number, age: number, sex: Sex, weightKg: number) {
  const femaleFactor = sex === "female" ? 0.85 : 1;
  return (((140 - age) * weightKg) / (72 * scrMgDl)) * femaleFactor;
}

/** Schwartz 2009 bedside (tráº» em) */
function egfrSchwartz2009(heightCm: number, scrMgDl: number) {
  return 0.413 * (heightCm / scrMgDl);
}

function stageFromEgfr(egfr: number) {
  if (egfr >= 90) return { stage: "G1", text: "BÃ¬nh thÆ°á»ng / cao (â‰¥90)" };
  if (egfr >= 60) return { stage: "G2", text: "Giáº£m nháº¹ (60â€“89)" };
  if (egfr >= 45) return { stage: "G3a", text: "Giáº£m nháº¹â€“vá»«a (45â€“59)" };
  if (egfr >= 30) return { stage: "G3b", text: "Giáº£m vá»«aâ€“náº·ng (30â€“44)" };
  if (egfr >= 15) return { stage: "G4", text: "Giáº£m náº·ng (15â€“29)" };
  return { stage: "G5", text: "Suy tháº­n (<15)" };
}

function formulaTextForReport(formula: Formula) {
  switch (formula) {
    case "ckd-epi-2021":
      return "CKD-EPI 2021";
    case "ckd-epi-2009":
      return "CKD-EPI 2009";
    case "mdrd-175":
      return "MDRD 175";
    case "cockcroft-gault":
      return "Cockcroftâ€“Gault (CrCl)";
    case "schwartz-2009":
      return "Schwartz 2009";
  }
}

function mapSexLabelToValue(sexLabel?: string): Sex {
  // Patient.sex trong context lÃ  "Nam" | "Ná»¯"
  if (!sexLabel) return "female";
  return sexLabel.toLowerCase().includes("nam") ? "male" : "female";
}

function calcAgeFromYob(yob?: number) {
  if (!yob || !Number.isFinite(yob)) return null;
  const y = new Date().getFullYear();
  const a = y - yob;
  if (!Number.isFinite(a)) return null;
  return clampNumber(a, 1, 120);
}

export default function EGFR() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const casesApi = useCases();

  const activeCase = casesApi.activeCase;
  const openNewCaseModal = casesApi.openNewCaseModal;
  const saveToActiveCase = casesApi.saveToActiveCase;

  // âœ… SAFE: cÃ³ thÃ¬ gá»i, khÃ´ng cÃ³ thÃ¬ fallback (trÃ¡nh crash tráº¯ng trang)
  const activeCaseLabel =
    typeof (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel === "function"
      ? (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel({ compact: true, fallback: "ChÆ°a chá»n ca" })
      : activeCase
        ? `${activeCase.patient.name} â€¢ ${activeCase.patient.yob}`
        : "ChÆ°a chá»n ca";

  // ---- UI state ----
  const [formula, setFormula] = useState<Formula>("ckd-epi-2021");

  const [sex, setSex] = useState<Sex>("female");
  const [age, setAge] = useState<number>(40);

  // Creatinine input
  const [scrUnit, setScrUnit] = useState<"mgdl" | "umol">("umol");
  const [scrValue, setScrValue] = useState<number>(80);

  // Extra inputs
  const [weightKg, setWeightKg] = useState<number>(60);
  const [heightCm, setHeightCm] = useState<number>(120);

  // âœ… Äá»“ng bá»™ tá»« activeCase (chá»‰ set khi cÃ³ dá»¯ liá»‡u há»£p lÃ½)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!activeCase) return;

    const p = activeCase.patient;

    // Sex
    const mappedSex = mapSexLabelToValue(p.sex);
    setSex((prev) => (prev ? mappedSex : mappedSex));

    // Age tá»« yob
    const a = calcAgeFromYob(p.yob);
    if (a) setAge(a);

    // Weight/Height
    if (typeof p.weightKg === "number" && Number.isFinite(p.weightKg)) {
      setWeightKg(clampNumber(p.weightKg, 20, 250));
    }
    if (typeof p.heightCm === "number" && Number.isFinite(p.heightCm)) {
      setHeightCm(clampNumber(p.heightCm, 30, 220));
    }
  }, [activeCase?.id]); // chá»‰ cháº¡y khi Ä‘á»•i ca

  const scrMgDl = useMemo(() => {
    const v = safePositive(scrValue, 0.01);
    if (scrUnit === "mgdl") return v;
    return v / 88.4; // umol -> mg/dL
  }, [scrUnit, scrValue]);

  const computed = useMemo(() => {
    const a = clampNumber(age, 1, 120);
    const scr = safePositive(scrMgDl, 0.01);

    if (formula === "ckd-epi-2021") {
      const egfr = egfrCkdEpi2021Creatinine(scr, a, sex);
      return {
        value: egfr,
        unit: "mL/phÃºt/1.73mÂ²",
        label: "eGFR (CKD-EPI 2021)",
        indexed: true as const,
      };
    }

    if (formula === "ckd-epi-2009") {
      const egfr = egfrCkdEpi2009Creatinine(scr, a, sex);
      return {
        value: egfr,
        unit: "mL/phÃºt/1.73mÂ²",
        label: "eGFR (CKD-EPI 2009)",
        indexed: true as const,
      };
    }

    if (formula === "mdrd-175") {
      const egfr = egfrMdrd175(scr, a, sex);
      return {
        value: egfr,
        unit: "mL/phÃºt/1.73mÂ²",
        label: "eGFR (MDRD 175)",
        indexed: true as const,
      };
    }

    if (formula === "cockcroft-gault") {
      const w = clampNumber(weightKg, 20, 250);
      const crcl = crclCockcroftGault(scr, a, sex, w);
      return {
        value: crcl,
        unit: "mL/phÃºt",
        label: "CrCl (Cockcroftâ€“Gault)",
        indexed: false as const,
      };
    }

    // schwartz-2009
    const h = clampNumber(heightCm, 30, 220);
    const egfr = egfrSchwartz2009(h, scr);
    return {
      value: egfr,
      unit: "mL/phÃºt/1.73mÂ²",
      label: "eGFR (Schwartz 2009 â€“ tráº» em)",
      indexed: true as const,
    };
  }, [formula, age, sex, scrMgDl, weightKg, heightCm]);

  const valueDisplay = useMemo(
    () => round1(safePositive(computed.value, 0)),
    [computed.value]
  );

  const stage = useMemo(() => {
    if (!computed.indexed) return null;
    return stageFromEgfr(computed.value);
  }, [computed]);

  const reset = () => {
    setFormula("ckd-epi-2021");
    // giá»¯ Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ tá»« ca náº¿u Ä‘ang cÃ³ ca: reset creatinine thÃ´i sáº½ há»£p lÃ½ hÆ¡n
    setScrUnit("umol");
    setScrValue(80);

    // reset phá»¥ thuá»™c cÃ´ng thá»©c
    setWeightKg(activeCase?.patient.weightKg ?? 60);
    setHeightCm(activeCase?.patient.heightCm ?? 120);

    // sex/age láº¥y theo ca náº¿u cÃ³, khÃ´ng thÃ¬ default
    setSex(activeCase ? mapSexLabelToValue(activeCase.patient.sex) : "female");
    setAge(activeCase ? (calcAgeFromYob(activeCase.patient.yob) ?? 40) : 40);
  };

  const onSaveToCase = () => {
    if (!activeCase) {
      openNewCaseModal();
      return;
    }

    const when = new Date().toISOString();

    const scrUmol = scrUnit === "umol" ? scrValue : scrValue * 88.4;
    const scrMg = scrUnit === "mgdl" ? scrValue : scrValue / 88.4;

    const reportFormulaText = formulaTextForReport(formula);
    const isCockcroft = formula === "cockcroft-gault";
    const isSchwartz = formula === "schwartz-2009";

    const outValue = round1(computed.value);
    const unitText = computed.unit;

    const summary = computed.indexed
      ? `eGFR: ${outValue} ${unitText}${stage?.stage ? ` â€¢ ${stage.stage}` : ""}`
      : `CrCl: ${outValue} ${unitText}`;

    saveToActiveCase({
      tool: "egfr",
      summary,
      inputs: {
        formula,
        sex,
        age,
        scrUnit,
        scrValue: round1(scrValue),
        scrUmol: round1(scrUmol),
        scrMgDl: round1(scrMg),
        weightKg: isCockcroft ? round1(weightKg) : undefined,
        heightCm: isSchwartz ? round1(heightCm) : undefined,
        // thÃªm label ca Ä‘á»ƒ trace (optional)
        caseLabel: activeCaseLabel,
      },
      outputs: {
        value: outValue,
        unit: unitText,
        indexed: computed.indexed,
        stage: stage?.stage,
        stageText: stage?.text,
        creatinineText: `${round1(scrUmol)} Âµmol/L (${round1(scrMg)} mg/dL)`,
        formulaText: reportFormulaText,
        when,
      },
    });

    alert("ÄÃ£ lÆ°u vÃ o ca âœ…");
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="card" style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            justifyContent: "space-between",
            gap: 12,
            flexWrap: "wrap",
            alignItems: "center",
          }}
        >
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10 }}>
            <button
              onClick={() => navigate(-1)}
              className="btn"
              type="button"
            >
              â† Trá»Ÿ vá»
            </button>

            <div>
              <h1 className="pageTitle" style={{ fontSize: 20, margin: 0 }}>
                Má»©c lá»c cáº§u tháº­n / Äá»™ thanh tháº£i
              </h1>
              <div style={{ marginTop: 4, color: "var(--muted)" }}>
                Chá»n cÃ´ng thá»©c vÃ  nháº­p thÃ´ng sá»‘
              </div>
              <div style={{ marginTop: 6, color: "var(--muted)", fontSize: 12 }}>
                Ca Ä‘ang chá»n: <b>{activeCaseLabel}</b>
              </div>
              {!activeCase && (
                <div style={{ marginTop: 6, color: "var(--muted)", fontSize: 12 }}>
                  ChÆ°a cÃ³ ca Ä‘ang chá»n. Báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ báº¥m <b>LÆ°u vÃ o ca</b> Ä‘á»ƒ táº¡o ca má»›i.
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            <button onClick={reset} className="btn" type="button">
              Reset
            </button>

            <button onClick={onSaveToCase} className="btnPrimary" type="button">
              LÆ°u vÃ o ca
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{ marginTop: 12, fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)" }}>
          LÆ°u Ã½: Cockcroftâ€“Gault (CrCl) thÆ°á»ng dÃ¹ng Ä‘á»ƒ chá»‰nh liá»u thuá»‘c; cÃ¡c eGFR chuáº©n hoÃ¡ theo 1.73mÂ² dÃ¹ng phÃ¢n táº§ng G. CÃ´ng cá»¥ tham kháº£o.
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid">
        {/* Inputs */}
        <div className="card" style={{ gridColumn: "span 7" }}>
          <h2 style={{ marginTop: 0, fontSize: 16 }}>Nháº­p dá»¯ liá»‡u</h2>

          <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 12 }}>
            {/* Formula */}
            <div
              style={{
                display: "flex",
                justifyContent: "space-between",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: 12,
                padding: 12,
                border: "1px solid var(--line)",
                borderRadius: 14,
                background: "white",
              }}
            >
              <div style={{ fontWeight: 900 }}>CÃ´ng thá»©c</div>
              <select
                value={formula}
                onChange={(e) => setFormula(e.target.value as Formula)}
                className="select"
                style={{ minWidth: 280 }}
              >
                <option value="ckd-epi-2021">CKD-EPI 2021 (Creatinin) â€“ race-free</option>
                <option value="ckd-epi-2009">CKD-EPI 2009 (Creatinin)</option>

                <option value="cockcroft-gault">Cockcroftâ€“Gault (CrCl â€“ chá»‰nh liá»u)</option>

          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

// src/calculators/Epworth.tsx
import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import { useCases } from "../context/CasesContext";

const QUESTIONS = [
  "Ngá»“i vÃ  Ä‘á»c",
  "Xem TV",
  "Ngá»“i khÃ´ng hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng á»Ÿ nÆ¡i cÃ´ng cá»™ng",
  "LÃ m hÃ nh khÃ¡ch trÃªn xe cháº¡y 1 giá» liÃªn tá»¥c",
  "Náº±m nghá»‰ buá»•i chiá»u khi cÃ³ Ä‘iá»u kiá»‡n",
  "Ngá»“i nÃ³i chuyá»‡n vá»›i ai Ä‘Ã³",
  "Ngá»“i yÃªn sau bá»¯a trÆ°a khÃ´ng uá»‘ng rÆ°á»£u",
  "Ngá»“i trong xe khi dá»«ng vÃ i phÃºt vÃ¬ káº¹t xe",
] as const;

const OPTIONS = [
  { value: 0, label: "0 â€” KhÃ´ng bao giá» ngá»§ gáº­t" },
  { value: 1, label: "1 â€” Kháº£ nÄƒng nháº¹" },
  { value: 2, label: "2 â€” Kháº£ nÄƒng vá»«a" },
  { value: 3, label: "3 â€” Kháº£ nÄƒng cao" },
] as const;

function resultFromScore(score: number) {
  if (score <= 10) return { level: "BÃ¬nh thÆ°á»ng", text: "Buá»“n ngá»§ ban ngÃ y khÃ´ng tÄƒng rÃµ" };
  if (score <= 14) return { level: "TÄƒng nháº¹", text: "CÃ³ tÄƒng buá»“n ngá»§ ban ngÃ y" };
  if (score <= 17) return { level: "TÄƒng vá»«a", text: "NÃªn Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ nguyÃªn nhÃ¢n vÃ  má»©c áº£nh hÆ°á»Ÿng" };
  return { level: "TÄƒng nhiá»u", text: "Cáº§n Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ sÃ¢u hÆ¡n / cÃ¢n nháº¯c chuyá»ƒn chuyÃªn khoa" };
}

export default function Epworth() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const casesApi = useCases();

  const activeCase = casesApi.activeCase;
  const openNewCaseModal = casesApi.openNewCaseModal;
  const saveToActiveCase = casesApi.saveToActiveCase;

  const activeCaseLabel =
    typeof (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel === "function"
      ? (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel({ compact: true, fallback: "ChÆ°a chá»n ca" })
      : activeCase
        ? `${activeCase.patient.name} â€¢ ${activeCase.patient.yob}`
        : "ChÆ°a chá»n ca";

  const [scores, setScores] = useState<number[]>(Array(8).fill(0));

  const total = useMemo(() => scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0), [scores]);
  const result = useMemo(() => resultFromScore(total), [total]);

  function setAt(idx: number, value: number) {
    setScores((prev) => prev.map((x, i) => (i === idx ? value : x)));
  }

  function reset() {
    setScores(Array(8).fill(0));
  }

  function onSaveToCase() {
    if (!activeCase) {
      openNewCaseModal();
      return;
    }

    const summary = `Epworth: ${total}/24 â€¢ ${result.level}`;

    saveToActiveCase({
      tool: "epworth",
      summary,
      inputs: {
        items: scores,
        caseLabel: activeCaseLabel,
      },
      outputs: {
        total,
        max: 24,
        level: result.level,
        interpretation: result.text,
        when: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
    });

    alert("ÄÃ£ lÆ°u vÃ o ca âœ…");
  }

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="card" style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            justifyContent: "space-between",
            gap: 12,
            flexWrap: "wrap",
            alignItems: "center",
          }}
        >
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10 }}>
            <button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} className="btn" type="button">
              â† Trá»Ÿ vá»

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";

type Choice = 0 | 1 | 2;

const CHOICES: { value: Choice; label: string; sub: string }[] = [
  { value: 0, label: "0", sub: "Háº§u nhÆ° khÃ´ng bao giá»" },
  { value: 1, label: "1", sub: "Thá»‰nh thoáº£ng" },
  { value: 2, label: "2", sub: "Háº§u nhÆ° luÃ´n luÃ´n" },
];

type ItemKey = "A1" | "P" | "G" | "A2" | "R";

type Item = {
  key: ItemKey;
  title: string;
  desc: string;
  hintLow: string;
};

const ITEMS: Item[] = [
  {
    key: "A1",
    title: "A â€“ Adaptation",
    desc: "Gia Ä‘Ã¬nh cÃ³ giÃºp Ä‘á»¡ báº¡n khi báº¡n gáº·p khÃ³ khÄƒn/váº¥n Ä‘á» khÃ´ng?",
    hintLow: "Äiá»ƒm tháº¥p: thiáº¿u há»— trá»£ khi gáº·p khÃ³ khÄƒn â†’ cÃ¢n nháº¯c huy Ä‘á»™ng ngÆ°á»i thÃ¢n/nguá»“n lá»±c xÃ£ há»™i.",
  },
  {
    key: "P",
    title: "P â€“ Partnership",
    desc: "Gia Ä‘Ã¬nh cÃ³ cÃ¹ng báº¡n tháº£o luáº­n vÃ  chia sáº» trÃ¡ch nhiá»‡m/ra quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh khÃ´ng?",
    hintLow: "Äiá»ƒm tháº¥p: thiáº¿u há»£p tÃ¡c/chia sáº» quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh â†’ khuyáº¿n khÃ­ch ngÆ°á»i chÄƒm sÃ³c tham gia buá»•i tÆ° váº¥n.",
  },
  {
    key: "G",
    title: "G â€“ Growth",
    desc: "Gia Ä‘Ã¬nh cÃ³ á»§ng há»™ báº¡n phÃ¡t triá»ƒn vÃ  thá»­ nhá»¯ng Ä‘iá»u má»›i khÃ´ng?",
    hintLow: "Äiá»ƒm tháº¥p: thiáº¿u khÃ­ch lá»‡ phÃ¡t triá»ƒn â†’ Ä‘áº·t má»¥c tiÃªu nhá», há»— trá»£ Ä‘á»™ng lá»±c, tÄƒng cÆ°á»ng giao tiáº¿p tÃ­ch cá»±c.",
  },
  {
    key: "A2",
    title: "A â€“ Affection",
    desc: "Gia Ä‘Ã¬nh cÃ³ thá»ƒ hiá»‡n tÃ¬nh cáº£m/quan tÃ¢m vÃ  pháº£n há»“i cáº£m xÃºc cá»§a báº¡n khÃ´ng?",
    hintLow: "Äiá»ƒm tháº¥p: thiáº¿u giao tiáº¿p cáº£m xÃºc â†’ cÃ¢n nháº¯c tÆ° váº¥n gia Ä‘Ã¬nh/ká»¹ nÄƒng giao tiáº¿p, Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ stress.",
  },
  {
    key: "R",
    title: "R â€“ Resolve",
    desc: "Gia Ä‘Ã¬nh cÃ³ dÃ nh thá»i gian cho nhau vÃ  cÃ¹ng giáº£i quyáº¿t váº¥n Ä‘á» khÃ´ng?",
    hintLow: "Äiá»ƒm tháº¥p: thiáº¿u thá»i gian/giáº£i quyáº¿t xung Ä‘á»™t kÃ©m â†’ Æ°u tiÃªn káº¿ hoáº¡ch theo dÃµi, giáº£m stress, can thiá»‡p tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c.",
  },
];

function levelFromTotal(total: number) {
  // Thang thÆ°á»ng dÃ¹ng: 7â€“10 tá»‘t; 4â€“6 nháº¹-trung bÃ¬nh; 0â€“3 náº·ng
  if (total >= 7) {
    return {
      label: "Chá»©c nÄƒng gia Ä‘Ã¬nh tá»‘t",
      desc: "Gia Ä‘Ã¬nh lÃ  nguá»“n lá»±c há»— trá»£. CÃ³ thá»ƒ giao káº¿ hoáº¡ch tá»± quáº£n, theo dÃµi Ä‘á»‹nh ká»³.",
    };
  }
  if (total >= 4) {
    return {
      label: "Rá»‘i loáº¡n chá»©c nÄƒng má»©c nháº¹â€“trung bÃ¬nh",
      desc: "CÃ³ dáº¥u hiá»‡u háº¡n cháº¿ chá»©c nÄƒng. NÃªn khai thÃ¡c thÃªm nguyÃªn nhÃ¢n vÃ  can thiá»‡p trá»ng Ä‘iá»ƒm.",
    };
  }
  return {
    label: "Rá»‘i loáº¡n chá»©c nÄƒng náº·ng",
    desc: "Nguy cÆ¡ cao xung Ä‘á»™t/thiáº¿u há»— trá»£. Cáº§n Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ thÃªm an toÃ n, há»— trá»£ tÃ¢m lÃ½â€“xÃ£ há»™i vÃ  theo dÃµi sÃ¡t.",
    };
}

function weakestIssues(scores: Record<ItemKey, Choice>) {
  const arr = ITEMS.map((it) => ({ it, score: scores[it.key] }));
  arr.sort((a, b) => a.score - b.score);
  return arr.filter((x) => x.score <= 1).slice(0, 2);
}

export default function FamilyAPGAR() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const [scores, setScores] = useState<Record<ItemKey, Choice>>({
    A1: 1,
    P: 1,
    G: 1,
    A2: 1,
    R: 1,
  });

  const total = useMemo(() => {
    return (Object.values(scores) as number[]).reduce((s, x) => s + x, 0);
  }, [scores]);

  const level = useMemo(() => levelFromTotal(total), [total]);

  const issues = useMemo(() => weakestIssues(scores), [scores]);

  return (
    <div className="page">
      <div className="card">
        <div className="calcHeader">
          <div>
            <h1 className="calcTitle">Family APGAR</h1>
            <div className="calcSub">
              SÃ ng lá»c chá»©c nÄƒng gia Ä‘Ã¬nh (0â€“10). Má»—i má»¥c: 0 (háº§u nhÆ° khÃ´ng bao giá»), 1 (thá»‰nh thoáº£ng), 2 (háº§u nhÆ° luÃ´n luÃ´n).
            </div>
          </div>

          <button className="btn" onClick={() => navigate(-1)} title="Trá»Ÿ vá» trang trÆ°á»›c">
            â† Trá»Ÿ vá» trang trÆ°á»›c
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="divider" />

        {/* âœ… LIST Dá»ŒC */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 18 }}>
          {ITEMS.map((it, idx) => (
            <div key={it.key} style={{ paddingBottom: 10, borderBottom: "1px solid var(--line)" }}>
              <div style={{ fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 16 }}>
                {idx + 1}/5 â€¢ {it.title}
              </div>

              <div style={{ marginTop: 6, color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.5 }}>
                {it.desc}
              </div>

              <div
                style={{
                  marginTop: 12,
                  display: "grid",
                  gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))",
                  gap: 12,
                }}
              >
                {CHOICES.map((c) => {
                  const active = scores[it.key] === c.value;
                  return (
                    <button
                      key={c.value}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, [it.key]: c.value }))}
                      style={{
                        textAlign: "left",
                        borderRadius: 14,
                        padding: "12px 12px",
                        border: `1px solid ${active ? "rgba(29,78,216,0.55)" : "var(--line)"}`,
                        background: active ? "rgba(29,78,216,0.08)" : "white",
                        cursor: "pointer",
                        fontWeight: 900,
                      }}
                      title={c.sub}
                    >
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>
                        {c.label} â€¢ <span style={{ color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 800 }}>{c.sub}</span>
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {scores[it.key] <= 1 && (
                <div style={{ marginTop: 10, fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)" }}>{it.hintLow}</div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="divider" />

        {/* Result */}
        <div
          style={{
            border: "1px solid var(--line)",
            borderRadius: 16,
            padding: 14,
            background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.02)",
          }}
        >
          <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 16 }}>Káº¿t quáº£ Family APGAR</div>
            <div
              style={{
                padding: "6px 10px",
                borderRadius: 999,
                border: "1px solid var(--line)",
                background: "white",
                fontWeight: 900,
              }}
            >
              Tá»•ng Ä‘iá»ƒm: {total}/10
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 10, fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 18 }}>{level.label}</div>
          <div style={{ marginTop: 6, color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.5 }}>
            {level.desc}
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 12 }}>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 900, marginBottom: 8 }}>Gá»£i Ã½ Æ°u tiÃªn (má»¥c Ä‘iá»ƒm tháº¥p)</div>

            {issues.length === 0 ? (
              <div style={{ color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 700 }}>
                KhÃ´ng cÃ³ má»¥c Ä‘iá»ƒm tháº¥p (0â€“1). CÃ³ thá»ƒ táº­p trung káº¿ hoáº¡ch Ä‘iá»u trá»‹ vÃ  theo dÃµi Ä‘á»‹nh ká»³.

              <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 10 }}>

          </div>

===== FILE: C:\Users\meoti\OneDrive\Documents\Python\web\medical-tools\src\calculators\FENa.tsx =====

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useCases } from "../context/CasesContext";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

function round2(x: number) {
  return Math.round(x * 100) / 100;
}

function interpret(value: number) {
  if (value < 1) return "FENa < 1%: gá»£i Ã½ giáº£m tÆ°á»›i mÃ¡u tháº­n / nguyÃªn nhÃ¢n trÆ°á»›c tháº­n trong bá»‘i cáº£nh phÃ¹ há»£p.";
  if (value <= 2) return "FENa 1â€“2%: vÃ¹ng xÃ¡m, cáº§n phá»‘i há»£p lÃ¢m sÃ ng.";
  return "FENa > 2%: gá»£i Ã½ tá»•n thÆ°Æ¡ng nhu mÃ´ tháº­n / ATN trong bá»‘i cáº£nh phÃ¹ há»£p.";
}

export default function FENa() {
  const casesApi = useCases();
  const activeCase = casesApi.activeCase;
  const openNewCaseModal = casesApi.openNewCaseModal;
  const saveToActiveCase = casesApi.saveToActiveCase;

  const activeCaseLabel =
    typeof (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel === "function"
      ? (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel({ compact: true, fallback: "ChÆ°a chá»n ca" })
      : activeCase
        ? `${activeCase.patient.name} â€¢ ${activeCase.patient.yob}`
        : "ChÆ°a chá»n ca";

  const [urineNa, setUrineNa] = useState<number>(20);
  const [serumNa, setSerumNa] = useState<number>(140);
  const [urineCr, setUrineCr] = useState<number>(100);
  const [serumCr, setSerumCr] = useState<number>(2);

  const fena = useMemo(() => {
    return (urineNa * serumCr * 100) / (Math.max(serumNa, 0.01) * Math.max(urineCr, 0.01));
  }, [urineNa, serumNa, urineCr, serumCr]);

  function reset() {
    setUrineNa(20);
    setSerumNa(140);
    setUrineCr(100);
    setSerumCr(2);
  }

  function onSaveToCase() {
    if (!activeCase) {
      openNewCaseModal();
      return;
    }

    const summary = `FENa: ${round2(fena)}%`;

    saveToActiveCase({
      tool: "fena",
      summary,
      inputs: {
        urineNa,
        serumNa,
        urineCr,
        serumCr,
        caseLabel: activeCaseLabel,
      },
      outputs: {
        fena: round2(fena),
        interpretation: interpret(fena),
        when: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
    });

    alert("ÄÃ£ lÆ°u vÃ o ca âœ…");
  }

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
      title="FENa"
      subtitle="Fractional Excretion of Sodium"
      activeCaseLabel={activeCaseLabel}
      noCaseHint={!activeCase ? "ChÆ°a cÃ³ ca Ä‘ang chá»n. Báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ báº¥m LÆ°u vÃ o ca Ä‘á»ƒ táº¡o ca má»›i." : undefined}
      onReset={reset}
      onSave={onSaveToCase}
      left={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 12 }}>
          <CalculatorSection title="Na niá»‡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={urineNa} onChange={(e) => setUrineNa(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
          <CalculatorSection title="Na mÃ¡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={serumNa} onChange={(e) => setSerumNa(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
          <CalculatorSection title="Creatinin niá»‡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={urineCr} onChange={(e) => setUrineCr(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
          <CalculatorSection title="Creatinin mÃ¡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={serumCr} onChange={(e) => setSerumCr(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
        </div>
      }
      right={
        <CalculatorBox>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "baseline" }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 900 }}>FENa</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 34, fontWeight: 900 }}>{round2(fena)}</div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 6, fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)" }}>%</div>

          <CalculatorSection title="Diá»…n giáº£i" style={{ marginTop: 12, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.02)" }}>
            <div>{interpret(fena)}</div>
          </CalculatorSection>
        </CalculatorBox>
      }
      bottomNote="FENa cÃ³ thá»ƒ kÃ©m há»¯u Ã­ch khi dÃ¹ng lá»£i tiá»ƒu hoáº·c trong má»™t sá»‘ bá»‘i cáº£nh Ä‘áº·c biá»‡t."
    />
  );
}

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useCases } from "../context/CasesContext";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

function round2(x: number) {
  return Math.round(x * 100) / 100;
}

function interpret(value: number) {
  if (value < 35) return "FEUrea < 35%: gá»£i Ã½ nguyÃªn nhÃ¢n trÆ°á»›c tháº­n trong bá»‘i cáº£nh phÃ¹ há»£p.";
  if (value <= 50) return "FEUrea 35â€“50%: vÃ¹ng xÃ¡m, cáº§n phá»‘i há»£p lÃ¢m sÃ ng.";
  return "FEUrea > 50%: gá»£i Ã½ tá»•n thÆ°Æ¡ng nhu mÃ´ tháº­n trong bá»‘i cáº£nh phÃ¹ há»£p.";
}

export default function FEUrea() {
  const casesApi = useCases();
  const activeCase = casesApi.activeCase;
  const openNewCaseModal = casesApi.openNewCaseModal;
  const saveToActiveCase = casesApi.saveToActiveCase;

  const activeCaseLabel =
    typeof (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel === "function"
      ? (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel({ compact: true, fallback: "ChÆ°a chá»n ca" })
      : activeCase
        ? `${activeCase.patient.name} â€¢ ${activeCase.patient.yob}`
        : "ChÆ°a chá»n ca";

  const [urineUrea, setUrineUrea] = useState<number>(200);
  const [serumUrea, setSerumUrea] = useState<number>(20);
  const [urineCr, setUrineCr] = useState<number>(100);
  const [serumCr, setSerumCr] = useState<number>(2);

  const feurea = useMemo(() => {
    return (urineUrea * serumCr * 100) / (Math.max(serumUrea, 0.01) * Math.max(urineCr, 0.01));
  }, [urineUrea, serumUrea, urineCr, serumCr]);

  function reset() {
    setUrineUrea(200);
    setSerumUrea(20);
    setUrineCr(100);
    setSerumCr(2);
  }

  function onSaveToCase() {
    if (!activeCase) {
      openNewCaseModal();
      return;
    }

    const summary = `FEUrea: ${round2(feurea)}%`;

    saveToActiveCase({
      tool: "feurea",
      summary,
      inputs: {
        urineUrea,
        serumUrea,
        urineCr,
        serumCr,
        caseLabel: activeCaseLabel,
      },
      outputs: {
        feurea: round2(feurea),
        interpretation: interpret(feurea),
        when: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
    });

    alert("ÄÃ£ lÆ°u vÃ o ca âœ…");
  }

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
      title="FEUrea"
      subtitle="Fractional Excretion of Urea"
      activeCaseLabel={activeCaseLabel}
      noCaseHint={!activeCase ? "ChÆ°a cÃ³ ca Ä‘ang chá»n. Báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ báº¥m LÆ°u vÃ o ca Ä‘á»ƒ táº¡o ca má»›i." : undefined}
      onReset={reset}
      onSave={onSaveToCase}
      left={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 12 }}>
          <CalculatorSection title="Urea niá»‡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={urineUrea} onChange={(e) => setUrineUrea(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
          <CalculatorSection title="Urea mÃ¡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={serumUrea} onChange={(e) => setSerumUrea(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
          <CalculatorSection title="Creatinin niá»‡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={urineCr} onChange={(e) => setUrineCr(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
          <CalculatorSection title="Creatinin mÃ¡u">
            <input className="input" type="number" value={serumCr} onChange={(e) => setSerumCr(Number(e.target.value))} />
          </CalculatorSection>
        </div>
      }
      right={
        <CalculatorBox>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "baseline" }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 900 }}>FEUrea</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 34, fontWeight: 900 }}>{round2(feurea)}</div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 6, fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)" }}>%</div>

          <CalculatorSection title="Diá»…n giáº£i" style={{ marginTop: 12, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.02)" }}>
            <div>{interpret(feurea)}</div>
          </CalculatorSection>
        </CalculatorBox>
      }
      bottomNote="FEUrea thÆ°á»ng há»¯u Ã­ch hÆ¡n FENa khi bá»‡nh nhÃ¢n Ä‘ang dÃ¹ng lá»£i tiá»ƒu."
    />
  );
}

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useCases } from "../context/CasesContext";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

const QUESTIONS = [
  "Cáº£m tháº¥y há»“i há»™p, lo láº¯ng hoáº·c cÄƒng tháº³ng",
  "KhÃ´ng thá»ƒ ngá»«ng hoáº·c kiá»ƒm soÃ¡t lo láº¯ng",
  "Lo láº¯ng quÃ¡ nhiá»u vá» nhiá»u viá»‡c khÃ¡c nhau",
  "KhÃ³ thÆ° giÃ£n",
  "Bá»“n chá»“n Ä‘áº¿n má»©c khÃ³ ngá»“i yÃªn",
  "Dá»… cÃ¡u gáº¯t hoáº·c dá»… khÃ³ chá»‹u",
  "Cáº£m tháº¥y sá»£ nhÆ° thá»ƒ Ä‘iá»u gÃ¬ tá»“i tá»‡ sáº¯p xáº£y ra",
] as const;

const OPTIONS = [
  { value: 0, label: "0 â€” KhÃ´ng há»" },
  { value: 1, label: "1 â€” VÃ i ngÃ y" },
  { value: 2, label: "2 â€” HÆ¡n má»™t ná»­a sá»‘ ngÃ y" },
  { value: 3, label: "3 â€” Gáº§n nhÆ° má»—i ngÃ y" },
] as const;

function resultFromScore(score: number) {
  if (score <= 4) return { level: "Tá»‘i thiá»ƒu", text: "Ãt triá»‡u chá»©ng lo Ã¢u Ä‘Ã¡ng ká»ƒ" };
  if (score <= 9) return { level: "Nháº¹", text: "Theo dÃµi vÃ  Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ láº¡i náº¿u cáº§n" };
  if (score <= 14) return { level: "Trung bÃ¬nh", text: "CÃ¢n nháº¯c tÆ° váº¥n / can thiá»‡p" };
  return { level: "Náº·ng", text: "Cáº§n Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ ká»¹ vÃ  láº­p káº¿ hoáº¡ch Ä‘iá»u trá»‹" };
}

export default function GAD7() {
  const casesApi = useCases();

  const activeCase = casesApi.activeCase;
  const openNewCaseModal = casesApi.openNewCaseModal;
  const saveToActiveCase = casesApi.saveToActiveCase;

  const activeCaseLabel =
    typeof (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel === "function"
      ? (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel({ compact: true, fallback: "ChÆ°a chá»n ca" })
      : activeCase
        ? `${activeCase.patient.name} â€¢ ${activeCase.patient.yob}`
        : "ChÆ°a chá»n ca";

  const [scores, setScores] = useState<number[]>(Array(7).fill(0));
  const [difficulty, setDifficulty] = useState<string>("KhÃ´ng áº£nh hÆ°á»Ÿng rÃµ");

  const total = useMemo(() => scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0), [scores]);
  const result = useMemo(() => resultFromScore(total), [total]);

  function setAt(idx: number, value: number) {
    setScores((prev) => prev.map((x, i) => (i === idx ? value : x)));
  }

  function reset() {
    setScores(Array(7).fill(0));
    setDifficulty("KhÃ´ng áº£nh hÆ°á»Ÿng rÃµ");
  }

  function onSaveToCase() {
    if (!activeCase) {
      openNewCaseModal();
      return;
    }

    const summary = `GAD-7: ${total}/21 â€¢ ${result.level}`;

    saveToActiveCase({
      tool: "gad7",
      summary,
      inputs: {
        items: scores,
        difficulty,
        caseLabel: activeCaseLabel,
      },
      outputs: {
        total,
        max: 21,
        level: result.level,
        interpretation: result.text,
        when: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
    });

    alert("ÄÃ£ lÆ°u vÃ o ca âœ…");
  }

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
      title="GAD-7"
      subtitle="SÃ ng lá»c vÃ  phÃ¢n táº§ng má»©c Ä‘á»™ lo Ã¢u"
      activeCaseLabel={activeCaseLabel}
      noCaseHint={
        !activeCase
          ? "ChÆ°a cÃ³ ca Ä‘ang chá»n. Báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ báº¥m LÆ°u vÃ o ca Ä‘á»ƒ táº¡o ca má»›i."
          : undefined
      }
      onReset={reset}
      onSave={onSaveToCase}
      leftTitle="7 cÃ¢u há»i trong 2 tuáº§n qua"
      rightTitle="Káº¿t quáº£"
      bottomNote="CÃ´ng cá»¥ há»— trá»£ sÃ ng lá»c; khÃ´ng thay tháº¿ cháº©n Ä‘oÃ¡n lÃ¢m sÃ ng."
      left={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 12 }}>
          {QUESTIONS.map((q, idx) => (
            <CalculatorSection key={idx} title={`${idx + 1}. ${q}`}>
              <select
                className="select"
                value={scores[idx]}
                onChange={(e) => setAt(idx, Number(e.target.value))}
              >
                {OPTIONS.map((op) => (
                  <option key={op.value} value={op.value}>
                    {op.label}
                  </option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </CalculatorSection>
          ))}

          <CalculatorSection title="Má»©c áº£nh hÆ°á»Ÿng lÃªn cÃ´ng viá»‡c / viá»‡c nhÃ  / quan há»‡ xÃ£ há»™i">
            <select
              className="select"
              value={difficulty}
              onChange={(e) => setDifficulty(e.target.value)}
            >
              <option>KhÃ´ng áº£nh hÆ°á»Ÿng rÃµ</option>
              <option>KhÃ³ á»Ÿ má»©c Ã­t</option>
              <option>KhÃ³ á»Ÿ má»©c vá»«a</option>
              <option>Ráº¥t khÃ³</option>
            </select>
          </CalculatorSection>
        </div>
      }
      right={
        <CalculatorBox>
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              justifyContent: "space-between",
              alignItems: "baseline",
            }}
          >
            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)", fontWeight: 900 }}>
              Tá»•ng Ä‘iá»ƒm GAD-7
            </div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 34, fontWeight: 900, lineHeight: 1 }}>
              {total}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 6, fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)" }}>
            Thang Ä‘iá»ƒm 0â€“21
          </div>

          <CalculatorSection
            title="Má»©c Ä‘á»™"
            style={{ marginTop: 12, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.02)" }}
          >
            <div>
              <b>{result.level}</b> â€” {result.text}
            </div>
          </CalculatorSection>
        </CalculatorBox>
      }
    />
  );
}

===== FILE: C:\Users\meoti\OneDrive\Documents\Python\web\medical-tools\src\calculators\GaitSpeed.tsx =====

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

function InputRow(props: {
  label: string;
  value: string | number;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
  min?: number;
  max?: number;
  step?: number;
}) {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
      <label style={{ fontWeight: 700 }}>{props.label}</label>
      <input
        className="input"
        type="number"
        value={props.value}
        min={props.min}
        max={props.max}
        step={props.step}
        onChange={(e) => props.onChange(e.target.value)}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

export default function GaitSpeed() {
  const [distance, setDistance] = useState<number | "">(6);
  const [time, setTime] = useState<number | "">("");

  const speed = useMemo(() => {
    if (distance === "" || time === "" || Number(time) <= 0) return null;
    return Number((Number(distance) / Number(time)).toFixed(2));
  }, [distance, time]);

  const interpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (speed == null) return "Nháº­p Ä‘á»§ dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘á»ƒ tÃ­nh.";
    if (speed < 0.8) return "Äi bá»™ cháº­m rÃµ, gá»£i Ã½ giáº£m hiá»‡u nÄƒng váº­n Ä‘á»™ng.";
    if (speed < 1.0) return "Äi bá»™ cháº­m.";
    return "Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ Ä‘i bá»™ trong ngÆ°á»¡ng cháº¥p nháº­n Ä‘Æ°á»£c.";
  }, [speed]);

  const handleReset = () => {
    setDistance(6);
    setTime("");
  };

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
      title="Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ Ä‘i bá»™"
      subtitle="ÄÃ¡nh giÃ¡ váº­n Ä‘á»™ng báº±ng quÃ£ng Ä‘Æ°á»ng vÃ  thá»i gian Ä‘i bá»™"
      leftTitle="Nháº­p dá»¯ liá»‡u"
      rightTitle="Káº¿t quáº£"
      onReset={handleReset}
      left={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 14 }}>
          <CalculatorSection title="ThÃ´ng sá»‘ Ä‘o">
            <InputRow
              label="QuÃ£ng Ä‘Æ°á»ng (m)"
              value={distance}
              min={1}
              step={0.1}
              onChange={(v) => setDistance(v === "" ? "" : Number(v))}
            />
            <InputRow
              label="Thá»i gian (giÃ¢y)"
              value={time}
              min={0.1}
              step={0.1}
              onChange={(v) => setTime(v === "" ? "" : Number(v))}
            />
          </CalculatorSection>
        </div>
      }
      right={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 14 }}>
          <CalculatorBox>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 16, marginBottom: 8 }}>Káº¿t quáº£</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 1000 }}>
              {speed == null ? "--" : `${speed} m/s`}
            </div>
            <div style={{ marginTop: 8, color: "var(--muted)", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
              {interpretation}
            </div>
          </CalculatorBox>
        </div>
      }
    />
  );
}

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

type Sex = "male" | "female";

function clampNumber(value: number, min: number, max: number) {
  if (Number.isNaN(value)) return min;
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
}

function toDisplay(value: number | ""): string | number {
  return value === "" ? "" : value;
}

export default function GeriatricAssessmentCalculator() {
  // Katz ADL
  const [kBathing, setKBathing] = useState(false);
  const [kDressing, setKDressing] = useState(false);
  const [kToileting, setKToileting] = useState(false);
  const [kTransfer, setKTransfer] = useState(false);
  const [kContinence, setKContinence] = useState(false);
  const [kFeeding, setKFeeding] = useState(false);

  // Lawton IADL
  const [lPhone, setLPhone] = useState(false);
  const [lShopping, setLShopping] = useState(false);
  const [lFoodPrep, setLFoodPrep] = useState(false);
  const [lHousekeeping, setLHousekeeping] = useState(false);
  const [lLaundry, setLLaundry] = useState(false);
  const [lTransport, setLTransport] = useState(false);
  const [lMedication, setLMedication] = useState(false);
  const [lFinance, setLFinance] = useState(false);

  // Gait speed
  const [walkDistance, setWalkDistance] = useState<number | "">(6);
  const [walkTime, setWalkTime] = useState<number | "">("");

  // Grip strength
  const [sex, setSex] = useState<Sex>("male");
  const [gripStrength, setGripStrength] = useState<number | "">("");

  // MMSE
  const [mmseOrientation, setMmseOrientation] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mmseRegistration, setMmseRegistration] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mmseAttention, setMmseAttention] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mmseRecall, setMmseRecall] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mmseLanguage, setMmseLanguage] = useState<number | "">("");

  // MoCA
  const [mocaVisuoExec, setMocaVisuoExec] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mocaNaming, setMocaNaming] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mocaAttention, setMocaAttention] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mocaLanguage, setMocaLanguage] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mocaAbstraction, setMocaAbstraction] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mocaDelayedRecall, setMocaDelayedRecall] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mocaOrientation, setMocaOrientation] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [mocaEducationBonus, setMocaEducationBonus] = useState(false);

  const katzScore = useMemo<number>(() => {
    return [
      kBathing,
      kDressing,
      kToileting,
      kTransfer,
      kContinence,
      kFeeding,
    ].filter(Boolean).length;
  }, [kBathing, kDressing, kToileting, kTransfer, kContinence, kFeeding]);

  const katzInterpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (katzScore === 6) return "Äá»™c láº­p hoÃ n toÃ n trong ADL cÆ¡ báº£n.";
    if (katzScore >= 4) return "Giáº£m chá»©c nÄƒng nháº¹.";
    if (katzScore >= 2) return "Giáº£m chá»©c nÄƒng má»©c Ä‘á»™ vá»«a.";
    return "Phá»¥ thuá»™c nhiá»u trong ADL cÆ¡ báº£n.";
  }, [katzScore]);

  const lawtonScore = useMemo<number>(() => {
    return [
      lPhone,
      lShopping,
      lFoodPrep,
      lHousekeeping,
      lLaundry,
      lTransport,
      lMedication,
      lFinance,
    ].filter(Boolean).length;
  }, [
    lPhone,
    lShopping,
    lFoodPrep,
    lHousekeeping,
    lLaundry,
    lTransport,
    lMedication,
    lFinance,
  ]);

  const lawtonInterpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (lawtonScore === 8) return "Äá»™c láº­p tá»‘t trong IADL.";
    if (lawtonScore >= 5) return "Giáº£m má»™t pháº§n kháº£ nÄƒng sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™c láº­p.";
    if (lawtonScore >= 3) return "Phá»¥ thuá»™c má»©c Ä‘á»™ vá»«a trong IADL.";
    return "Phá»¥ thuá»™c nhiá»u trong IADL.";
  }, [lawtonScore]);

  const gaitSpeed = useMemo<number | null>(() => {
    if (walkDistance === "" || walkTime === "" || Number(walkTime) <= 0) {
      return null;
    }
    return Number((Number(walkDistance) / Number(walkTime)).toFixed(2));
  }, [walkDistance, walkTime]);

  const gaitInterpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (gaitSpeed == null) return "ChÆ°a Ä‘á»§ dá»¯ liá»‡u.";
    if (gaitSpeed < 0.8) return "Äi bá»™ cháº­m rÃµ, nguy cÆ¡ suy giáº£m váº­n Ä‘á»™ng cao.";
    if (gaitSpeed < 1.0) return "Äi bá»™ cháº­m.";
    return "Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ Ä‘i bá»™ táº¡m cháº¥p nháº­n.";
  }, [gaitSpeed]);

  const gripCutoff = sex === "male" ? 28 : 18;

  const gripInterpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (gripStrength === "") return "ChÆ°a Ä‘á»§ dá»¯ liá»‡u.";
    if (Number(gripStrength) < gripCutoff) {
      return `Sá»©c náº¯m tháº¥p theo ngÆ°á»¡ng tham chiáº¿u (${gripCutoff} kg).`;
    }
    return `Sá»©c náº¯m chÆ°a giáº£m theo ngÆ°á»¡ng tham chiáº¿u (${gripCutoff} kg).`;
  }, [gripStrength, gripCutoff]);

  const mmseScore = useMemo<number | null>(() => {
    const parts: Array<number | ""> = [
      mmseOrientation,
      mmseRegistration,
      mmseAttention,
      mmseRecall,
      mmseLanguage,
    ];

    if (parts.every((x) => x === "")) return null;

    return parts.reduce<number>((sum, x) => {
      return sum + (x === "" ? 0 : Number(x));
    }, 0);
  }, [
    mmseOrientation,
    mmseRegistration,
    mmseAttention,
    mmseRecall,
    mmseLanguage,
  ]);

  const mmseInterpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (mmseScore == null) return "ChÆ°a Ä‘á»§ dá»¯ liá»‡u.";
    if (mmseScore >= 24) return "SÃ ng lá»c: chÆ°a gá»£i Ã½ suy giáº£m nháº­n thá»©c rÃµ.";
    if (mmseScore >= 18) return "SÃ ng lá»c: cÃ³ thá»ƒ suy giáº£m nháº­n thá»©c nháº¹-vá»«a.";
    return "SÃ ng lá»c: cÃ³ thá»ƒ suy giáº£m nháº­n thá»©c Ä‘Ã¡ng ká»ƒ.";
  }, [mmseScore]);

  const mocaRaw = useMemo<number | null>(() => {
    const parts: Array<number | ""> = [
      mocaVisuoExec,
      mocaNaming,
      mocaAttention,
      mocaLanguage,
      mocaAbstraction,
      mocaDelayedRecall,
      mocaOrientation,
    ];

    if (parts.every((x) => x === "")) return null;

    return parts.reduce<number>((sum, x) => {
      return sum + (x === "" ? 0 : Number(x));
    }, 0);
  }, [
    mocaVisuoExec,
    mocaNaming,
    mocaAttention,
    mocaLanguage,
    mocaAbstraction,
    mocaDelayedRecall,
    mocaOrientation,
  ]);

  const mocaScore = useMemo<number | null>(() => {
    if (mocaRaw == null) return null;
    return Math.min(30, mocaRaw + (mocaEducationBonus ? 1 : 0));
  }, [mocaRaw, mocaEducationBonus]);

  const mocaInterpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (mocaScore == null) return "ChÆ°a Ä‘á»§ dá»¯ liá»‡u.";
    if (mocaScore >= 26) return "SÃ ng lá»c: trong ngÆ°á»¡ng thÆ°á»ng dÃ¹ng lÃ  bÃ¬nh thÆ°á»ng.";
    return "SÃ ng lá»c: dÆ°á»›i ngÆ°á»¡ng thÆ°á»ng dÃ¹ng, nÃªn Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ lÃ¢m sÃ ng thÃªm.";
  }, [mocaScore]);

  const handleReset = () => {
    setKBathing(false);
    setKDressing(false);
    setKToileting(false);
    setKTransfer(false);
    setKContinence(false);
    setKFeeding(false);

    setLPhone(false);
    setLShopping(false);
    setLFoodPrep(false);
    setLHousekeeping(false);
    setLLaundry(false);
    setLTransport(false);
    setLMedication(false);
    setLFinance(false);

    setWalkDistance(6);
    setWalkTime("");

    setSex("male");
    setGripStrength("");

    setMmseOrientation("");
    setMmseRegistration("");
    setMmseAttention("");
    setMmseRecall("");
    setMmseLanguage("");

    setMocaVisuoExec("");
    setMocaNaming("");
    setMocaAttention("");
    setMocaLanguage("");
    setMocaAbstraction("");
    setMocaDelayedRecall("");
    setMocaOrientation("");
    setMocaEducationBonus(false);
  };

  const left = (
    <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 14 }}>
      <CalculatorSection title="1) Chá»©c nÄƒng cÆ¡ báº£n - Katz ADL">
        <CheckRow label="Táº¯m rá»­a Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={kBathing} onChange={setKBathing} />
        <CheckRow
          label="Máº·c quáº§n Ã¡o Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={kDressing}
          onChange={setKDressing}
        />
        <CheckRow
          label="Äi vá»‡ sinh Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={kToileting}
          onChange={setKToileting}
        />
        <CheckRow
          label="Di chuyá»ƒn / chuyá»ƒn tÆ° tháº¿ Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={kTransfer}
          onChange={setKTransfer}
        />
        <CheckRow
          label="Kiá»ƒm soÃ¡t tiá»ƒu tiá»‡n / Ä‘áº¡i tiá»‡n"
          checked={kContinence}
          onChange={setKContinence}
        />
        <CheckRow label="Ä‚n uá»‘ng Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={kFeeding} onChange={setKFeeding} />
      </CalculatorSection>

      <CalculatorSection title="2) Chá»©c nÄƒng dá»¥ng cá»¥ - Lawton IADL">
        <CheckRow
          label="Sá»­ dá»¥ng Ä‘iá»‡n thoáº¡i Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={lPhone}
          onChange={setLPhone}
        />
        <CheckRow label="Mua sáº¯m Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={lShopping} onChange={setLShopping} />
        <CheckRow
          label="Chuáº©n bá»‹ bá»¯a Äƒn Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={lFoodPrep}
          onChange={setLFoodPrep}
        />
        <CheckRow
          label="Dá»n dáº¹p nhÃ  cá»­a Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={lHousekeeping}
          onChange={setLHousekeeping}
        />
        <CheckRow label="Giáº·t giÅ© Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={lLaundry} onChange={setLLaundry} />
        <CheckRow
          label="Äi láº¡i / phÆ°Æ¡ng tiá»‡n Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={lTransport}
          onChange={setLTransport}
        />
        <CheckRow
          label="DÃ¹ng thuá»‘c Ä‘Ãºng Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={lMedication}
          onChange={setLMedication}
        />
        <CheckRow
          label="Quáº£n lÃ½ tÃ i chÃ­nh Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
          checked={lFinance}
          onChange={setLFinance}
        />
      </CalculatorSection>

      <CalculatorSection title="3) Váº­n Ä‘á»™ng - Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ Ä‘i bá»™">
        <InputRow
          label="QuÃ£ng Ä‘Æ°á»ng (m)"
          value={toDisplay(walkDistance)}
          type="number"

        </div>

      title="ÄÃ¡nh giÃ¡ lÃ£o khoa"

      rightTitle="Káº¿t quáº£"

          cáº£nh thá»±c táº¿ cá»§a ngÆ°á»i bá»‡nh.

function InputRow(props: {
  label: string;
  value: string | number;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
  type?: string;
  min?: number;
  max?: number;
  step?: number;
}) {
  const { label, value, onChange, type = "text", min, max, step } = props;

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
      <label style={{ fontWeight: 700 }}>{label}</label>
      <input
        className="input"
        type={type}
        value={value}
        min={min}
        max={max}
        step={step}
        onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

function CheckRow(props: {
  label: string;
  checked: boolean;
  onChange: (checked: boolean) => void;
}) {
  const { label, checked, onChange } = props;

  return (
    <label
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        gap: 10,
        padding: "8px 10px",
        border: "1px solid var(--line)",
        borderRadius: 12,
      }}
    >
      <input
        type="checkbox"
        checked={checked}
        onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.checked)}
      />
      <span>{label}</span>
    </label>
  );
}

function ResultItem(props: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  note: string;
}) {
  const { label, value, note } = props;

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        padding: "10px 0",
        borderBottom: "1px solid var(--line)",
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          justifyContent: "space-between",
          gap: 12,
          alignItems: "baseline",
        }}
      >
        <div style={{ fontWeight: 800 }}>{label}</div>
        <div style={{ fontWeight: 900 }}>{value}</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{ marginTop: 4, color: "var(--muted)", lineHeight: 1.6 }}>
        {note}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: C:\Users\meoti\OneDrive\Documents\Python\web\medical-tools\src\calculators\GripStrength.tsx =====

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

type Sex = "male" | "female";

function InputRow(props: {
  label: string;
  value: string | number;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
  min?: number;
  max?: number;
  step?: number;
}) {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
      <label style={{ fontWeight: 700 }}>{props.label}</label>
      <input
        className="input"
        type="number"
        value={props.value}
        min={props.min}
        max={props.max}
        step={props.step}
        onChange={(e) => props.onChange(e.target.value)}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

export default function GripStrength() {
  const [sex, setSex] = useState<Sex>("male");
  const [grip, setGrip] = useState<number | "">("");

  const cutoff = sex === "male" ? 28 : 18;

  const interpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (grip === "") return "Nháº­p Ä‘á»§ dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘á»ƒ Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡.";
    if (Number(grip) < cutoff) return `Sá»©c náº¯m tháº¥p theo ngÆ°á»¡ng tham chiáº¿u (${cutoff} kg).`;
    return `Sá»©c náº¯m chÆ°a giáº£m theo ngÆ°á»¡ng tham chiáº¿u (${cutoff} kg).`;
  }, [grip, cutoff]);

  const handleReset = () => {
    setSex("male");
    setGrip("");
  };

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
      title="Sá»©c náº¯m tay"
      subtitle="ÄÃ¡nh giÃ¡ sá»©c cÆ¡ báº±ng lá»±c náº¯m tay"
      leftTitle="Nháº­p dá»¯ liá»‡u"
      rightTitle="Káº¿t quáº£"
      onReset={handleReset}
      left={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 14 }}>
          <CalculatorSection title="ThÃ´ng sá»‘ Ä‘o">
            <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
              <label style={{ fontWeight: 700 }}>Giá»›i tÃ­nh</label>
              <select className="select" value={sex} onChange={(e) => setSex(e.target.value as Sex)}>
                <option value="male">Nam</option>
                <option value="female">Ná»¯</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <InputRow
              label="Sá»©c náº¯m tay tá»‘i Ä‘a (kg)"
              value={grip}
              min={0}
              step={0.1}
              onChange={(v) => setGrip(v === "" ? "" : Number(v))}
            />
          </CalculatorSection>
        </div>
      }
      right={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 14 }}>
          <CalculatorBox>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 16, marginBottom: 8 }}>Káº¿t quáº£</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 1000 }}>
              {grip === "" ? "--" : `${grip} kg`}
            </div>
            <div style={{ marginTop: 8, color: "var(--muted)", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
              {interpretation}
            </div>
          </CalculatorBox>
        </div>
      }
    />
  );
}

// src/calculators/HASBLED.tsx
import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import { useMemo, useState } from "react";

export default function HASBLED() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const [h, setH] = useState(false); // HTN
  const [renal, setRenal] = useState(false);
  const [liver, setLiver] = useState(false);
  const [stroke, setStroke] = useState(false);
  const [bleeding, setBleeding] = useState(false);
  const [labileINR, setLabileINR] = useState(false);
  const [elderly, setElderly] = useState(false); // >65
  const [drugs, setDrugs] = useState(false); // antiplatelet/NSAID
  const [alcohol, setAlcohol] = useState(false);

  const score = useMemo(() => {
    let s = 0;
    if (h) s += 1;
    if (renal) s += 1;
    if (liver) s += 1;
    if (stroke) s += 1;
    if (bleeding) s += 1;
    if (labileINR) s += 1;
    if (elderly) s += 1;
    if (drugs) s += 1;
    if (alcohol) s += 1;
    return s;
  }, [h, renal, liver, stroke, bleeding, labileINR, elderly, drugs, alcohol]);

  const risk = useMemo(() => {
    if (score >= 3) return { level: "Cao", text: "HAS-BLED â‰¥3: nguy cÆ¡ cháº£y mÃ¡u cao â†’ theo dÃµi sÃ¡t vÃ  tá»‘i Æ°u yáº¿u tá»‘ nguy cÆ¡." };
    if (score === 2) return { level: "Trung bÃ¬nh", text: "Nguy cÆ¡ trung bÃ¬nh â†’ theo dÃµi vÃ  kiá»ƒm soÃ¡t yáº¿u tá»‘ nguy cÆ¡." };
    return { level: "Tháº¥p", text: "Nguy cÆ¡ tháº¥p â†’ váº«n cáº§n cÃ¢n nháº¯c lÃ¢m sÃ ng vÃ  theo dÃµi." };
  }, [score]);

  return (
    <div className="page">
      <div className="card">
        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            justifyContent: "space-between",
            gap: 12,
            flexWrap: "wrap",
            alignItems: "center",
          }}
        >
          <h2 style={{ marginTop: 0, marginBottom: 0 }}>HAS-BLED</h2>

          <button
            onClick={() => navigate(-1)}
            style={{
              padding: "10px 12px",
              borderRadius: 12,
              border: "1px solid var(--line)",
              background: "white",
              cursor: "pointer",
              fontWeight: 900,
            }}
            title="Trá»Ÿ vá» trang trÆ°á»›c"
          >
            â† Trá»Ÿ vá» trang trÆ°á»›c
          </button>
        </div>

        <div style={{ color: "var(--muted)", marginBottom: 12, marginTop: 10 }}>
          Tim máº¡ch â€¢ Nguy cÆ¡ cháº£y mÃ¡u á»Ÿ bá»‡nh nhÃ¢n rung nhÄ© dÃ¹ng khÃ¡ng Ä‘Ã´ng
        </div>

        <div
          style={{
            padding: 12,
            borderRadius: 12,
            border: "1px solid var(--line)",
            background: "white",
          }}
        >
          <label style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center" }}>
            <input type="checkbox" checked={h} onChange={(e) => setH(e.target.checked)} />
            H: TÄƒng HA khÃ´ng kiá»ƒm soÃ¡t
          </label>

          <label style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center", marginTop: 10 }}>
            <input type="checkbox" checked={renal} onChange={(e) => setRenal(e.target.checked)} />
            A: Báº¥t thÆ°á»ng tháº­n
          </label>

          <label style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center", marginTop: 10 }}>
            <input type="checkbox" checked={liver} onChange={(e) => setLiver(e.target.checked)} />
            A: Báº¥t thÆ°á»ng gan
          </label>

          <label style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center", marginTop: 10 }}>
            <input type="checkbox" checked={stroke} onChange={(e) => setStroke(e.target.checked)} />
            S: Tiá»n sá»­ Ä‘á»™t quá»µ
          </label>

          <label style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center", marginTop: 10 }}>
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={bleeding}
              onChange={(e) => setBleeding(e.target.checked)}
            />

          </label>

          <label style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center", marginTop: 10 }}>

            style={{

          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: C:\Users\meoti\OneDrive\Documents\Python\web\medical-tools\src\calculators\Hba1cEag.tsx =====

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useCases } from "../context/CasesContext";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

function round1(x: number) {
  return Math.round(x * 10) / 10;
}

export default function Hba1cEag() {
  const casesApi = useCases();
  const activeCase = casesApi.activeCase;
  const openNewCaseModal = casesApi.openNewCaseModal;
  const saveToActiveCase = casesApi.saveToActiveCase;

  const activeCaseLabel =
    typeof (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel === "function"
      ? (casesApi as any).getActiveCaseLabel({ compact: true, fallback: "ChÆ°a chá»n ca" })
      : activeCase
        ? `${activeCase.patient.name} â€¢ ${activeCase.patient.yob}`
        : "ChÆ°a chá»n ca";

  const [hba1c, setHba1c] = useState<number>(7);

  const eagMgDl = useMemo(() => 28.7 * hba1c - 46.7, [hba1c]);
  const eagMmol = useMemo(() => eagMgDl / 18, [eagMgDl]);

  function reset() {
    setHba1c(7);
  }

  function onSaveToCase() {
    if (!activeCase) {
      openNewCaseModal();
      return;
    }

    const summary = `HbA1c ${round1(hba1c)}% â†’ eAG ${round1(eagMgDl)} mg/dL (${round1(eagMmol)} mmol/L)`;

    saveToActiveCase({
      tool: "hba1c-eag",
      summary,
      inputs: {
        hba1c: round1(hba1c),
        caseLabel: activeCaseLabel,
      },
      outputs: {
        eagMgDl: round1(eagMgDl),
        eagMmolL: round1(eagMmol),
        formula: "eAG (mg/dL) = 28.7 Ã— HbA1c âˆ’ 46.7",
        when: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
    });

    alert("ÄÃ£ lÆ°u vÃ o ca âœ…");
  }

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
      title="HbA1c â†’ eAG"
      subtitle="Quy Ä‘á»•i HbA1c sang Ä‘Æ°á»ng huyáº¿t trung bÃ¬nh Æ°á»›c tÃ­nh"
      activeCaseLabel={activeCaseLabel}
      noCaseHint={!activeCase ? "ChÆ°a cÃ³ ca Ä‘ang chá»n. Báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ báº¥m LÆ°u vÃ o ca Ä‘á»ƒ táº¡o ca má»›i." : undefined}
      onReset={reset}
      onSave={onSaveToCase}
      left={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 12 }}>
          <CalculatorSection title="HbA1c (%)">
            <input
              className="input"
              type="number"
              step="0.1"
              min={3}
              max={20}
              value={hba1c}
              onChange={(e) => setHba1c(Number(e.target.value))}
            />
          </CalculatorSection>
        </div>
      }
      right={
        <CalculatorBox>
          <CalculatorSection title="eAG (mg/dL)">
            <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 900 }}>{round1(eagMgDl)}</div>
          </CalculatorSection>

          <CalculatorSection title="eAG (mmol/L)" style={{ marginTop: 12 }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 900 }}>{round1(eagMmol)}</div>
          </CalculatorSection>

          </CalculatorSection>
        </CalculatorBox>
      }
      bottomNote="eAG lÃ  giÃ¡ trá»‹ Æ°á»›c tÃ­nh, khÃ´ng thay tháº¿ theo dÃµi glucose thá»±c táº¿."
    />
  );
}

===== FILE: C:\Users\meoti\OneDrive\Documents\Python\web\medical-tools\src\calculators\ISI.tsx =====

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";

type ResultSeverity = "low" | "moderate" | "high";

type CalcResult = {
  score: number;
  levelText: string;
  severity: ResultSeverity;
  interpretation: string;
  caveat?: string;
};

function clampNumber(v: number, min: number, max: number) {
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, v));
}

function Badge({ severity, text }: { severity: ResultSeverity; text: string }) {
  const bg =
    severity === "low"
      ? "rgba(16,185,129,0.12)"
      : severity === "moderate"
      ? "rgba(245,158,11,0.14)"
      : "rgba(239,68,68,0.14)";

  const bd =
    severity === "low"
      ? "rgba(16,185,129,0.35)"
      : severity === "moderate"
      ? "rgba(245,158,11,0.35)"
      : "rgba(239,68,68,0.35)";

  return (
    <span
      style={{
        display: "inline-flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        gap: 8,
        padding: "6px 10px",
        borderRadius: 999,
        border: `1px solid ${bd}`,
        background: bg,
        fontWeight: 800,
        fontSize: 12,
      }}
    >
      {text}
    </span>
  );
}

/**
 * TEMPLATE: báº¡n thay pháº§n nÃ y theo calculator tháº­t
 * VÃ­ dá»¥ ISI: 7 cÃ¢u, má»—i cÃ¢u 0â€“4
 */
type FormState = {
  q1: number;
  q2: number;
  q3: number;
  q4: number;
  q5: number;
  q6: number;
  q7: number;
};

const initialState: FormState = {
  q1: 0,
  q2: 0,
  q3: 0,
  q4: 0,
  q5: 0,
  q6: 0,
  q7: 0,
};

function computeResult(values: FormState): CalcResult {
  const score =
    values.q1 +
    values.q2 +
    values.q3 +
    values.q4 +
    values.q5 +
    values.q6 +
    values.q7;

  // VÃ­ dá»¥ phÃ¢n táº§ng ISI (demo). Báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ thay theo guideline báº¡n chá»n.
  if (score <= 7) {
    return {
      score,
      severity: "low",
      levelText: "KhÃ´ng máº¥t ngá»§ / nháº¹",
      interpretation: "Äiá»ƒm tháº¥p. Theo dÃµi, Æ°u tiÃªn vá»‡ sinh giáº¥c ngá»§.",
    };
  }
  if (score <= 14) {
    return {
      score,
      severity: "moderate",
      levelText: "Máº¥t ngá»§ má»©c Ä‘á»™ nháº¹",
      interpretation:
        "CÃ¢n nháº¯c Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ thÃªm cÃ¡c yáº¿u tá»‘ liÃªn quan; can thiá»‡p hÃ nh vi.",
    };
  }
  if (score <= 21) {
    return {
      score,
      severity: "moderate",
      levelText: "Máº¥t ngá»§ má»©c Ä‘á»™ vá»«a",
      interpretation:
        "CÃ¢n nháº¯c Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ toÃ n diá»‡n, Æ°u tiÃªn CBT-I náº¿u phÃ¹ há»£p.",
    };
  }
  return {
    score,
    severity: "high",
    levelText: "Máº¥t ngá»§ má»©c Ä‘á»™ náº·ng",
    interpretation:
      "CÃ¢n nháº¯c thÄƒm khÃ¡m chuyÃªn khoa/Ä‘Ã¡nh giÃ¡ nguyÃªn nhÃ¢n, can thiá»‡p tÃ­ch cá»±c.",
    caveat: "Cáº§n loáº¡i trá»« nguyÃªn nhÃ¢n thá»±c thá»ƒ/thuá»‘c/loáº¡n tháº§n, v.v.",
  };
}

function NumberSelect({
  value,
  onChange,
  min = 0,
  max = 4,
}: {
  value: number;
  onChange: (v: number) => void;
  min?: number;
  max?: number;
}) {
  return (
    <select
      value={value}
      onChange={(e) => onChange(clampNumber(Number(e.target.value), min, max))}
      style={{
        padding: "10px 12px",
        borderRadius: 12,
        border: "1px solid var(--line)",
        background: "white",
        cursor: "pointer",
        minWidth: 120,
        fontWeight: 700,
      }}
    >
      {Array.from({ length: max - min + 1 }, (_, i) => i + min).map((n) => (
        <option key={n} value={n}>
          {n}
        </option>
      ))}
    </select>
  );
}

export default function CalculatorTemplate_ISI() {
  const [values, setValues] = useState<FormState>(initialState);

  const result = useMemo(() => computeResult(values), [values]);

  const setField = (k: keyof FormState, v: number) => {
    setValues((prev) => ({ ...prev, [k]: v }));
  };

  const reset = () => setValues(initialState);

  return (
    <div className="page">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="card" style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>

            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center" }}>
            <button
              onClick={reset}
              style={{
                padding: "10px 12px",
                borderRadius: 12,
                border: "1px solid var(--line)",
                background: "white",
                cursor: "pointer",
                fontWeight: 800,
              }}
            >
              Reset
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{ marginTop: 12, fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)" }}>
          Nguá»“n/ghi chÃº: (Ä‘iá»n guideline/bÃ i bÃ¡o báº¡n dÃ¹ng) â€¢ CÃ´ng cá»¥ chá»‰ mang tÃ­nh tham kháº£o.
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid">
        {/* Left: Form */}
        <div className="card" style={{ gridColumn: "span 7" }}>

              { key: "q3", label: "3) Thá»©c dáº­y sá»›m" },

              { key: "q5", label: "5) áº¢nh hÆ°á»Ÿng Ä‘áº¿n hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng ban ngÃ y" },

              { key: "q7", label: "7) Má»©c Ä‘á»™ cÄƒng tháº³ng do máº¥t ngá»§" },
            ].map((item) => (
              <div
                key={item.key}
                style={{
                  display: "flex",
                  justifyContent: "space-between",
                  alignItems: "center",
                  gap: 12,
                  padding: "12px",
                  border: "1px solid var(--line)",
                  borderRadius: 14,
                  background: "white",
                }}
              >
                <div style={{ fontWeight: 800 }}>{item.label}</div>
                <NumberSelect
                  value={values[item.key as keyof FormState]}
                  onChange={(v) => setField(item.key as keyof FormState, v)}
                />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 12, fontSize: 12, color: "var(--muted)" }}>
            Thang Ä‘iá»ƒm máº«u: 0â€“4 má»—i má»¥c (tuá»³ tool báº¡n cÃ³ thá»ƒ Ä‘á»•i thÃ nh input sá»‘, checkbox, radio).

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

function CheckRow(props: {
  label: string;
  checked: boolean;
  onChange: (checked: boolean) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <label
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        gap: 10,
        padding: "10px 12px",
        border: "1px solid var(--line)",
        borderRadius: 12,
        background: "white",
      }}
    >
      <input
        type="checkbox"
        checked={props.checked}
        onChange={(e) => props.onChange(e.target.checked)}
      />
      <span>{props.label}</span>
    </label>
  );
}

export default function KatzADL() {
  const [bathing, setBathing] = useState(false);
  const [dressing, setDressing] = useState(false);
  const [toileting, setToileting] = useState(false);
  const [transferring, setTransferring] = useState(false);
  const [continence, setContinence] = useState(false);
  const [feeding, setFeeding] = useState(false);

  const score = useMemo(() => {
    return [
      bathing,
      dressing,
      toileting,
      transferring,
      continence,
      feeding,
    ].filter(Boolean).length;
  }, [bathing, dressing, toileting, transferring, continence, feeding]);

  const interpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (score === 6) return "Äá»™c láº­p hoÃ n toÃ n trong hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng sá»‘ng cÆ¡ báº£n.";
    if (score >= 4) return "Giáº£m chá»©c nÄƒng nháº¹.";
    if (score >= 2) return "Giáº£m chá»©c nÄƒng má»©c Ä‘á»™ vá»«a.";
    return "Phá»¥ thuá»™c nhiá»u trong hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng sá»‘ng cÆ¡ báº£n.";
  }, [score]);

  const handleReset = () => {
    setBathing(false);
    setDressing(false);
    setToileting(false);
    setTransferring(false);
    setContinence(false);
    setFeeding(false);
  };

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
      title="Katz ADL"
      subtitle="ÄÃ¡nh giÃ¡ chá»©c nÄƒng cÆ¡ báº£n á»Ÿ ngÆ°á»i cao tuá»•i"
      leftTitle="Nháº­p dá»¯ liá»‡u"
      rightTitle="Káº¿t quáº£"
      onReset={handleReset}
      left={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 14 }}>
          <CalculatorSection title="Chá»n cÃ¡c hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng bá»‡nh nhÃ¢n lÃ m Ä‘á»™c láº­p">
            <CheckRow label="Táº¯m rá»­a Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={bathing} onChange={setBathing} />
            <CheckRow label="Máº·c quáº§n Ã¡o Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={dressing} onChange={setDressing} />
            <CheckRow label="Äi vá»‡ sinh Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={toileting} onChange={setToileting} />
            <CheckRow
              label="Di chuyá»ƒn / chuyá»ƒn tÆ° tháº¿ Ä‘á»™c láº­p"
              checked={transferring}
              onChange={setTransferring}
            />
            <CheckRow
              label="Kiá»ƒm soÃ¡t tiá»ƒu tiá»‡n / Ä‘áº¡i tiá»‡n"
              checked={continence}
              onChange={setContinence}
            />
            <CheckRow label="Ä‚n uá»‘ng Ä‘á»™c láº­p" checked={feeding} onChange={setFeeding} />
          </CalculatorSection>
        </div>
      }
      right={
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 14 }}>
          <CalculatorBox>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 16, marginBottom: 8 }}>Káº¿t quáº£</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 1000 }}>{score}/6</div>
            <div style={{ marginTop: 8, color: "var(--muted)", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
              {interpretation}
            </div>
          </CalculatorBox>

          <CalculatorBox>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 900, marginBottom: 8 }}>Diá»…n giáº£i nhanh</div>
            <div style={{ color: "var(--muted)", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
              Äiá»ƒm cÃ ng cao cÃ ng Ä‘á»™c láº­p tá»‘t trong sinh hoáº¡t cÆ¡ báº£n háº±ng ngÃ y.
            </div>
          </CalculatorBox>
        </div>
      }

}

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";

  CalculatorBox,

} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

function CheckRow(props: {
  label: string;
  checked: boolean;
  onChange: (checked: boolean) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <label
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        gap: 10,
        padding: "10px 12px",
        border: "1px solid var(--line)",
        borderRadius: 12,
        background: "white",
      }}
    >
      <input
        type="checkbox"
        checked={props.checked}
        onChange={(e) => props.onChange(e.target.checked)}
      />
      <span>{props.label}</span>
    </label>
  );
}

export default function LawtonIADL() {

  const [transport, setTransport] = useState(false);

  const [finance, setFinance] = useState(false);

      phone,

      foodPrep,
      housekeeping,
      laundry,
      transport,
      medication,
      finance,
    ].filter(Boolean).length;

    setFoodPrep(false);

    setLaundry(false);
    setTransport(false);
    setMedication(false);
    setFinance(false);
  };

      title="Lawton IADL"

===== FILE: C:\Users\meoti\OneDrive\Documents\Python\web\medical-tools\src\calculators\MMSE.tsx =====

import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import CalculatorTemplate, {
  CalculatorBox,
  CalculatorSection,
} from "../components/calculator/CalculatorTemplate";

function clampNumber(value: number, min: number, max: number) {
  if (Number.isNaN(value)) return min;
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
}

function InputRow(props: {
  label: string;
  value: string | number;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
  min?: number;
  max?: number;
}) {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 6 }}>
      <label style={{ fontWeight: 700 }}>{props.label}</label>
      <input
        className="input"
        type="number"
        value={props.value}
        min={props.min}
        max={props.max}
        onChange={(e) => props.onChange(e.target.value)}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

export default function MMSE() {
  const [orientation, setOrientation] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [registration, setRegistration] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [attention, setAttention] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [recall, setRecall] = useState<number | "">("");
  const [language, setLanguage] = useState<number | "">("");

  const score = useMemo<number | null>(() => {
    const values: Array<number | ""> = [
      orientation,
      registration,
      attention,
      recall,
      language,
    ];

    if (values.every((x) => x === "")) return null;

    return values.reduce<number>((sum, x) => {
      return sum + (x === "" ? 0 : Number(x));
    }, 0);
  }, [orientation, registration, attention, recall, language]);

  const interpretation = useMemo(() => {
    if (score == null) return "Nháº­p Ã­t nháº¥t má»™t miá»n Ä‘iá»ƒm Ä‘á»ƒ tÃ­nh.";
    if (score >= 24) return "SÃ ng lá»c: chÆ°a gá»£i Ã½ suy giáº£m nháº­n thá»©c rÃµ.";
    if (score >= 18) return "SÃ ng lá»c: cÃ³ thá»ƒ suy giáº£m nháº­n thá»©c nháº¹-vá»«a.";
    return "SÃ ng lá»c: cÃ³ thá»ƒ suy giáº£m nháº­n thá»©c Ä‘Ã¡ng ká»ƒ.";
  }, [score]);

  const handleReset = () => {
    setOrientation("");
    setRegistration("");
    setAttention("");
    setRecall("");
    setLanguage("");
  };

  return (
    <CalculatorTemplate
